purpose: Review accumulated observations, promote durable lessons into rules, and remove low-value memory.
verification: Promote only cross-project lessons with repeated validation and a clear future use case.
Preserve ownership boundaries for SOUL, USER, COMMUNICATION, WORKSPACE, skills, and axioms.
Do not rewrite unrelated memory or rules.
Reply with a concise promotion report.
memory_policy: Promoted material should become shorter, more operational, and easier to reuse than the raw observation.
